title: AI 가격 경쟁 격화 — 모델 단가 인하와 Anthropic 인도 현지 가격
summary: OpenAI·Meta·Musk가 모델 단가를 낮추며 AI 가격 경쟁이 본격화됐다. Anthropic은 미국 다음 최대 시장인 인도에 Claude 현지 가격을 도입했고, 신규 모델 해석성 연구와 규제 인용 이슈도 이어졌다.

items.title: AI price war heats up as OpenAI, Meta and Musk slash model costs

items.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman accuse each other of scamming investors as each pitches their AI vision

items.title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
items.point: Anthropic has started localizing Claude's pricing in India, its biggest market outside the U.S., as global AI companies increasingly tailor their offerings...

items.title: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show
items.point: The company says it has found a new window into how its models arrive at answers. We spoke with senior editor Will Douglas Heaven about it.

items.point: Multiple Google Pixel 10 devices are down, starting at just $599 for the base model.
